deal_radar.assessment: Short interest 7.0% with shares short +27.3% MoM signals building bearish positioning; short ratio only 1.96 days so cover would be fast on upside surprise.

catalysts_general: Trading at 49% discount to analyst consensus implied PE

Workflow peer trading at premium despite similar drawdown
Not in input data; pure-play competitor in work management, trades at meaningful premium

Not in input data; India IT services, trades at premium on dividend and scale

value_picks.analyst_take: Cheapest multiple in the group with net cash and heavy short interest creating asymmetric upside if growth reaccelerates. AI substitution risk is real for pure IT services, so WATCHLIST until FY guidance confirms stabilization or price touches $122.
